repair_candidate.summary: Repair editable contributor PR #94016 for the Telegram/gateway channel recovery bug: after a pending stop-timeout task recovery, the first monitor pass may return, but a subsequent monitor pass must clear stale pending task state and continue into channel start. This worker could not inspect or patch the checkout because read-only shell commands failed before execution, so the executor must perform the source verification and repair.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): resume channel after pending task recovery
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary

Repairs the channel recovery path from #94016 for #94008. After a stop timeout leaves stale pending task state behind, the first recovery monitor pass may return, but a later pass must clear the stale state and continue into the normal channel start path instead of leaving Telegram permanently stopped.

This keeps the patch scoped to gateway channel recovery control flow and focused regression coverage.

Credit: based on the contributor fix from @sheyanmin in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94016 and the report in #94008.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/channel-health-monitor.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Codex `/review` clean before merge
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @sheyanmin via https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94016.
Preserve issue attribution for #94008 by thomasthelen-kibeauftragter.
If a replacement PR becomes necessary, name #94016 as the source PR and carry @sheyanmin attribution in the PR body.
